memoryArtifacts.headline: Plaque commemorating Hugh d'Avranches in Avranches, Normandy.
The Wolf head carved on the grave stone was the mark of Hugh Lupus and was found under the Chapterhouse floor.
Chester Cathedral. Photo added to Find a Grave by genealogybuff on 20 August 2009.
Thurston le Goz in Ayres - Dawson and Allied Families, pg. 442

zh.lifeSummary: 當Hugh d'Avranches, Earl of Chester於1050年8月19日出生在法國諾門迪曼其阿福朗徹斯時，他的父親Richard le Goz Viscount of Avranches24歲，母親Emma de Conteville22歲。他和N.N. various mistresses至少有2個兒子和3個女兒。他去世於1101年7月27日在英國英格蘭爾切斯特享年50歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭爾切斯特。

nameMeanings.name: Hugh
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name, Hugues, Hugo, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from hug ‘heart, mind, spirit’. It was originally a short form of various compound names containing this element. This was borne by the aristocracy of medieval France, adopted by the Normans, and introduced by them to Britain. It was consistently one of the most popular boys' names in the Middle Ages in England, but fell out of favour in the 16th century until it was revived in the 20th century. Little Hugh of Lincoln was a child supposed in the Middle Ages to have been murdered by Jews in about 1255 , a legend responsible for several outbursts of anti-Semitism at various times. The story is referred to by Chaucer in The Prioress's Tale. He is not to be confused with St Hugh of Lincoln ( 1140–1200 ), bishop of Lincoln ( 1186–1200 ), who was noted for his charity and good works, his piety, and his defence of the Church against the State. Since the later Middle Ages Hugh has also been used as an Anglicized form of the Gaelic name Aodh .

en.lifeSummary: When Hugh d'Avranches, Earl of Chester was born on 19 August 1050, in Avranches, Manche, Normandy, France, his father, Richard le Goz Viscount of Avranches, was 24 and his mother, Emma de Conteville, was 22. He had at least 2 sons and 3 daughters with N.N. various mistresses. He died on 27 July 1101, in Chester, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 50, and was buried in Chester, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Hugh d'Avranches, Earl of Chester est né le 19 août 1050, à Avranches, Manche, Normandie, France, son père, Richard le Goz Viscount of Avranches, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Emma de Conteville, avait 22 ans. Il a eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles avec N.N. various mistresses. Il est décédé le 27 juillet 1101, à Chester, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 50 ans, et a été enterré à Chester, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Hugh d'Avranches, Earl of Chester am 19. August 1050 in Avranches, Manche, Normandie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Richard le Goz Viscount of Avranches 24 und seine Mutter Emma de Conteville 22. Er hatte mit N.N. various mistresses mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 27. Juli 1101 im Alter von 50 Jahren in Chester, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Chester, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Hugh d'Avranches, Earl of Chester è nato il il 19 agosto 1050 nel Avranches, Manche, Normandie, Francia, il suo padre, Richard le Goz Viscount of Avranches, aveva 24 anni e il suo madre, Emma de Conteville, aveva 22 anni. Lui avuto almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie con N.N. various mistresses. Morì il 27 luglio 1101, nel Chester, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 50 anni, e fu sepolto a Chester, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Hugh d'Avranches, Earl of Chesterが1050年8月19日にフランスノーマンディマンチェアvランチェスで生まれた時，父Richard le Goz Viscount of Avranchesは24歳，母Emma de Contevilleは22歳であった。彼はN.N. various mistressesとの間に少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘をもうけた。彼は1101年7月27日にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアチェスターで50歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスチェシュアイアチェスターにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Hugh d'Avranches, Earl of Chester(이)가 1050년 8월 19일 프랑스 노먼디 먼체 아브랭체스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Richard le Goz Viscount of Avranches(은)는 24세였고, 그의 어머니 Emma de Conteville(은)는 22세였다. 그는 N.N. various mistresses(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1101년 7월 27일 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 체스터에서 50세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 체스터에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Hugh d'Avranches, Earl of Chester родился 19 августа 1050 г. в местности авранчесь, манч, норманди, Франция, его отцу по имени Richard le Goz Viscount of Avranches было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Emma de Conteville, 22. У него было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери от N.N. various mistresses. Он умер 27 июля 1101 г. в местности честир, чешир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 50 лет и был похоронен в местности честир, чешир, Англия, Великобритания.
